title: haplophyllum obovatum
intro: Haplophyllum obovatum, also known as the bitter orange or bitter spurge, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Haplophyllum obovatum include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating pain, as well as being used as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
